# Tech Debt Skill (Alias)

This skill is retained for backward compatibility.

Use the canonical quality auditing skill instead:

- Full instructions: `.github/skills/quality-auditor/SKILL.md`

## Notes
- Use `quality-auditor` for both quality scanning and tech-debt cleanup.
- Keep this alias to avoid breaking older prompts and task files.
